Serrated Dragon Tooth  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: RANGE PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 18
DMG: 13 Dmg Bonus: 35 AC: 30
Backstab DMG: 13
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
DEX: +10 STA: +10 AGI: +10
SV FIRE: +12 SV DISEASE: +12 SV COLD: +12 SV MAGIC: +12 SV POISON: +12
Haste: +41%
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD MNK BRD ROG BST
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Serrated Dragon Tooth
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: RANGE PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 18
DMG: 13 Dmg Bonus: 35 AC: 30
Backstab DMG: 13
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
DEX: +10 STA: +10 AGI: +10
SV FIRE: +12 SV DISEASE: +12 SV COLD: +12 SV MAGIC: +12 SV POISON: +12
Haste: +41%
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD MNK BRD ROG BST
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:1H Piercing
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:rale
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-08-31 10:03:27
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 50
[Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Test of the Tooth

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Temple of Veeshan


Uploaded November 5th, 2022 by halfridge
Updated November 6th, 2022
Send a correction
« Previous 1 2 Next »
Post Comment
Easily Overlooked
QuoteReply
# Nov 27 2021 at 10:02 PM Rating: Good
halfridge
Sage
87 posts
For an item usable at level 1, very high AC in the range slot and evenly balanced resists, where Range and AC may be overlooked, as our eyes are trained to focus on dmg/dly for a weapon.

haste
QuoteReply
# Nov 13 2003 at 12:04 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591765133727
55 posts
worn haste works at level 1 not 40 or whatever they say
▲ Page top
RE: haste
QuoteReply
# Nov 23 2003 at 3:40 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1620001496181
Scholar
105 posts
That's just the way all haste items are categorized. haste percentage is level for effect+1.
▲ Page top
stackable?
QuoteReply
# Aug 21 2003 at 5:11 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591786620928
15 posts
Will this haste stack with worn items such as rogue epic?
▲ Page top
RE: stackable?
QuoteReply
# Aug 22 2003 at 7:47 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591751620058
4 posts
The effect is NOT stackable. However you will get 1% more haste, along with the ATK buff provided by Ragebringer.
▲ Page top
RE: stackable?
QuoteReply
# Feb 08 2004 at 3:41 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760628714

Scholar
116 posts
Yes, I believe u can throw a no drop item. I have looted some shissar fangs from ssra... and put them in range slot for the killer stats.. bad thing.. is that I cant find them anymore and I use throwing alot for pulling... Therefore; I believe u can throw a no drop item =)
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Dec 21 2002 at 9:51 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) ... you claim to be a 62 rogue that uses shissar fangs for the "killer stats" but "i cannot find them anymore". how did you get them in the first place if you cannot find no drop SHISSAR fangs? did it maybe occur to you they come off shissar? perhaps try ssra and you can get some more? or maybe you can just go kill taskmasters for a bag of the teeth so you can summon as many as you like. anyone can put anything they want into magelo and post any level they want under a post here or anywhere. but when it comes down to in game you still have to face reality.
RE: Re; Piercing
QuoteReply
# Dec 20 2002 at 6:20 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361662060
196 posts
Indeed you can throw no drops, but this item has no range listed on it, so it cannot be thrown

#REDACTED, Posted: Dec 12 2002 at 10:12 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) you say that you use stuff alot for pulling ... your a rouge ................. they tank worse than a enchanter so i really dont think that ur really a level 62 rogue... trust me from the hand of experence

QuoteReply
# Jul 22 2003 at 10:19 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592257248882
Scholar
155 posts
Rogues will often pull at higher levels, cause they can easily ditch the agro. Just like a ranger pulling and then jolting it off ,a rogue will pull and escape/evade the agro.

RE: peircing
QuoteReply
# Jul 01 2002 at 8:26 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591779671460
5 posts
You CAN use weapons that you have no skill in, you'll just suck horribly with them in regards to your ATK.

More importantly, you CANNOT throw a No Drop weapon (Found this one out with my Gem of Rage a long time ago).
▲ Page top
RE: peircing
QuoteReply
# Aug 13 2003 at 1:47 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1638145982070
View User Forum
Sage
201 posts
YOu can't throw your gem of rage because it's not a weapon, and has no range value. Shissar fangs are no drop, you can throw them.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 09 2002 at 11:55 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Plus, it doesn't have a range...so you couldn't throw it even if it weren't NODROP...consider it a REALLY nice Ranged item...that you can stab ppl with -=P

# Apr 29 2002 at 3:37 PM Rating: Default

Just got this nice lil trophy last night on EMARR Server. Had 2 guilds helping me get it and was very grateful to them. All I got to say about this nice lil whole puncher is *drool*
▲ Page top
monk
QuoteReply
# Apr 23 2002 at 12:22 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591759018338
163 posts
I'm not a monk but I see this item does have potential for one. If I were one I would stick this and the shield of hues or whatever its called. That way you get nice ac and resists when you are pulling. FD the pull then stick your good weapons on. Of course it would be hard to convince the guild of its usefulness, seeing how they would mention the fact that its really a nice item and monks can't use it for its ratio.

I like to think of the guild monk as my own player, or any character in the guild for that matter. When you work together as a guild you accomplish more. You know your in the wrong guild when the 55 pally gets the velious bp over a level 60 warrior that is wearing the same bp as the pally.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 16 2002 at 5:39 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I would have to say this is by far to good a weapon for some gimp monk to using it as a range item, look its 13 18, thats better then the damage/delay of a primal weapon. This weapon would be great for anyone, that would use it as a weapon not a ranged item.
RE: monk
QuoteReply
# Sep 07 2002 at 3:06 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591765559386
24 posts
OK you may not expect this but i am a monk of the 45th lvl and i agree that it would be largely wasted on a monk. Dont get me wrong i could use the stats easily, but that damage delay is a dream for many a meelee class. If i were in the Guild that got it, i would like to beleive that i would choose not to roll for it, so as to allow the people who could use that DMG/DLY to get it. But then i am weak willed, so i KNOW i would roll.

If you need advice i am here, if you need an example try elsewhere friend : )

▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Feb 21 2002 at 10:39 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i've only seen one ever in my entire life before on a 60 Vah shir bard from Mithaniel Marr. Probably in Afterlife...go figure that. But umm..yea...hugely uber item and i start slobbering all over everything and eevryone whenever i think about being able to receive any kind of item that stands up to this! wowwie on that one! wewt!
Info on this Quest.
QuoteReply
# Jan 04 2002 at 5:17 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592249494202
1 post
Ok The glowing orb thing they talking about in the quest section is called a glowing drake orb (super common), the next things you need are the white symbol(rare) and silver symbol(rare). these 3 things all come off the named DRAKES in the HoT (hall of testing). the drakes have lots of hp's and can be deadly to newbies. I my self have all 3 of these symbols/orb and just need the White Tear of Power from Dozekar the Cursed. Doze is a nasty beast of a dragon and will eat you with his AE unresistable 400 dd fire dmg (unresistable) so use ubah tackticks! If you can kill the drakes then doze is your biggest worry, His melee isn't as bad as Vindi (Derakor the Vindicator) but the AE dmg is much worse and has to be compesated for. all in all they are revitivly the same in toughness. I also have heard they UPGRADED this dagger. (yeah can you believe that? thanks Varent) from 12/19 to 13/18 or something close. (when i get it i'll come back to comfirm with Alla). i could be wrong with the upgrade but we'll find out soon enough. the haste is 41% I heard. without a strong guild or really nice friends this weapon is far from being yours. to the ones who have this weapon already grats d00d.

I hope this info helps some of you working on this quest or wanting to start. Good Luck.

Winor Sacrifice
57 Myrmidon
Aetherium
Quellious Server
Rallos Zek's Lost Soul




Edited, Fri Jan 4 17:22:08 2002

# Oct 24 2001 at 12:01 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592248405996
2 posts
You know why do people come on and post stupid crap that is a bunch of lies? You trying to look
big or something Deathss? First off...no one on
RZ is usually allowed on ToV raids unless you are
55+ because you are more hinderance than help. AE's will own you in HoT. And there are few guilds that even attempt to do ToV except the major sect guilds. There is no way you would be given the quest items for this quest TWICE much less at level 49, I doubt anyone even has ever gotten all the items for this on RZ yet..so stop with the lies

#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 23 2001 at 5:01 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) still as of yet no one answered if the items used in the quest can be given away im not a twink but i am curious because somepeople are and i want to be one of em :) so if anyone knows if they are no dropp quest items POST IT please? thanks

Or will the guy not give the dagger to a char under lvl 50????

#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 27 2001 at 2:35 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) We raided ToV last saturday and this dropped of Dorugozed the Damnable, we where all pretty anxious to see who would get it but in the end it went to our bard, Lambentus Halfelfion. I was so angry I went over to my guild leader's house at 3:30 AM and bashed him in the head with his third-place bowling trophy. I thought I killed him but maybe I just knocked him out because I didn't gain any exp or take a faction hit.
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 25 2001 at 2:32 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) CRAZY!!!!!!!!clicked haste. This is one of the best daggs for a rouge
